name: Factual
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Factual with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
Factual + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Factual with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Factual?

Factual is a data platform and location data provider that specializes in delivering accurate, real-time location-based information. Businesses use Factual's data to enhance their services, marketing efforts, and location-based applications.

Why Factual + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Factual, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Factual through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Factual.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Factual, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Factual + Synup?

The Factual integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Factual integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Factual logo to manage the Synup + Factual integration and associated settings.

seo.title: Factual
seo.description: Master local search with Factual. Synup integration ensures accurate business data for unmatched online visibility and credibility.
